news.title: Max Hodak’s Science Corp. is preparing to place its first sensor in a human brain
news.summary: The device could help address multiple neurological conditions if it proves successful. One early use could be delivering gentle electrical stimulation to damaged brain or spinal cord cells to encourage healing.
